title: myristica lancifolia subsp. kutubuensis
intro: Myristica lancifolia subsp. kutubuensis, also known as Kutubu nutmeg, is a plant species belonging to the Myristicaceae family. It is a tropical evergreen tree native to Papua New Guinea, and its seed is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kutubu nutmeg include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential use in treating certain types of cancer. Kutubu nutmeg is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
